title: Joseph Pulitzer: Voice of the People
original_title: Joseph Pulitzer: Voice of the People
overview: A biographical history of Hungarian immigrant Joseph Pulitzer, who revolutionized how news is presented, to whom it is catered to and the power of giving power to the masses.
